translation_text: All-pervading is the Great Dao! It may be found on the left hand and on the right.
translation_text_raw: All-pervading is the Great Dao! It may be found on the left hand and on the right.

translation_text: All things depend on it for their production, which it gives to them, not one refusing obedience to it.
translation_text_raw: All things depend on it for their production, which it gives to them, not one refusing obedience to it.

translation_text: When its work is accomplished, it does not claim the name of having done it.
translation_text_raw: When its work is accomplished, it does not claim the name of having done it.

translation_text: It clothes all things as with a garment, and makes no assumption of being their lord;
translation_text_raw: It clothes all things as with a garment, and makes no assumption of being their lord;

translation_text: - it may be named in the smallest things.
translation_text_raw: - it may be named in the smallest things.

chinese_text: 可名於小；萬物歸焉而不為主，
translation_text: All things return (to their root and disappear), and do not know that it is it which presides over their doing so;
translation_text_raw: All things return (to their root and disappear), and do not know that it is it which presides over their doing so;

translation_text: - it may be named in the greatest things.
translation_text_raw: - it may be named in the greatest things.

translation_text: Hence the sage is able (in the same way) to accomplish his great achievements.
translation_text_raw: Hence the sage is able (in the same way) to accomplish his great achievements.

translation_text: It is through his not making himself great that he can accomplish them.
translation_text_raw: It is through his not making himself great that he can accomplish them.
